Part.Source:
Event Start
LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Msgtt.ForeColor = RGB(0,40,150) Msgtt1.ForeColor = RGB(0,40,150)
txtexedido.Visible = 0 Msgtt.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) waMsgtt.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) Msgtt1.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) waMsgtt1.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0)
AvisoWhats1.ForeColor = RGB(0,150,200) AvisoWhats2.ForeColor = RGB(250,150,0) AvisoWhats3.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0)
&WaDtaEms = serverdate() &Ano = year(&WaDtaEms) &Mes = month(&WaDtaEms) &WaAnoMes = trim(str(&Ano)) + padL(trim(str(&mes)),2,'0') prcWhatsApp_verificaQtdEnviadaAnoMes.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &WaAnoMes, &WaAnoMesQtd, &EmpQtdWhatsMsg) if &EmpQtdWhatsMsg > &WaAnoMesQtd or &EmpQtdWhatsMsg = 0 AvisoWhats3.Visible = 0 Endif
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where PesCod = &Context.PesCod &PesCodRaz = PesRaz &waPesCodRaz = PesRaz For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod, PesEmlCod &PesEml = PesEml &waPesEml = PesEml Exit EndFor
Exit EndFor
padraousuarioHora.Call('L', '#ABASELECIONADA_ENVIABOLETO#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &AbaSelecionada, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') if &AbaSelecionada = 'W' GXUITabsPanel_TabsEnviar.SelectTab(2) txtAcoesPadrao.Visible = 0 Else txtAcoesPadrao1.Visible = 0 Endif
if &EmlUrl1.IsEmpty() and &EmlUrl2.IsEmpty() and &EmlUrl3.IsEmpty() and &EmlUrl4.IsEmpty() And &EmlUrl5.IsEmpty() And &EmlUrl6.IsEmpty() do 'LoadDados' Endif
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
UnnamedTable6.Height = 400 UnnamedTable13.Height = 400 &EmpCod.Visible = False &PesRaz.Visible = False Grid.Rows = 10 &GridCurrentPage = 1 &GridCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridPageCount = -1 WCwcHistoricoEnvioWhats.Object = wcHistoricoEnvioWhats.Create(&EmpCod, &NfeCod, 'NFE', '') GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Refresh
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//The variable '&GridPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar.
//Code block: LoadWWPContext LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
&GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridRecordCount = Grid.RecordCount &GridPageCount = grid.PageCount
EndEvent
Event Grid.Load
&EmlMsg = substr(EmlMsg, 1, 100)
Do Case Case EmlSts = Status_Solicitacao.Falha EmlSts.ForeColor = RGB(250,30,0)
Case EmlSts = Status_Solicitacao.Finalizada EmlSts.ForeColor = RGB(0,175,0)
Otherwise EmlSts.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0)
EndCase
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridCurrentPage -= 1 Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridCurrentPage += 1 Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridCurrentPage = &PageToGo Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridCurrentPage = 1 Grid.FirstPage()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'Dofone1'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
fone1_Modal.Confirm()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event fone1_Modal.OnLoadComponent
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
WWPAux_WC.Object = wpLocalizaFone.Create(&EmpCod, &PedCliCod)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'Dofone2'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
fone2_Modal.Confirm()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event fone2_Modal.OnLoadComponent
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
WWPAux_WC.Object = wpLocalizaFone.Create(&EmpCod, &PedCliCod)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'Dofone3'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
fone3_Modal.Confirm()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event fone3_Modal.OnLoadComponent
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
WWPAux_WC.Object = wpLocalizaFone.Create(&EmpCod, &PedCliCod)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'Dofone4'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
fone4_Modal.Confirm()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event fone4_Modal.OnLoadComponent
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
WWPAux_WC.Object = wpLocalizaFone.Create(&EmpCod, &PedCliCod)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoVisualizarAcoes1'
padraousuarioHora.Call('G', '#ABASELECIONADA_ENVIABOLETO#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, 'W', &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') txtAcoesPadrao.Visible = 0 txtAcoesPadrao1.Visible = 1
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoAtualizarInformacoes'
grid.Refresh()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoVisualizarAcoes'
padraousuarioHora.Call('G', '#ABASELECIONADA_ENVIABOLETO#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, 'E', &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') txtAcoesPadrao.Visible = 1 txtAcoesPadrao1.Visible = 0
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event fone1_Modal.Close
&PesFonCod = val(&WebSession.Get('PesFonCod')) &WebSession.Remove('PesFonCod')
if &PesFonCod > 0
do 'getNumeroFone' &PesFonNum1 = &PesFonNum txtad1.Caption = 'Contato: ' + &PesFonCon Endif
EndEvent
Event fone2_Modal.Close
&PesFonCod = val(&WebSession.Get('PesFonCod')) &WebSession.Remove('PesFonCod')
if &PesFonCod > 0
do 'getNumeroFone' &PesFonNum2 = &PesFonNum txtad2.Caption = 'Contato: ' + &PesFonCon Endif
EndEvent
Event fone3_Modal.Close
&PesFonCod = val(&WebSession.Get('PesFonCod')) &WebSession.Remove('PesFonCod')
if &PesFonCod > 0
do 'getNumeroFone' &PesFonNum3 = &PesFonNum txtad3.Caption = 'Contato: ' + &PesFonCon Endif
EndEvent
Event fone4_Modal.Close
&PesFonCod = val(&WebSession.Get('PesFonCod')) &WebSession.Remove('PesFonCod')
if &PesFonCod > 0
do 'getNumeroFone' &PesFonNum4 = &PesFonNum txtad4.Caption = 'Contato: ' + &PesFonCon Endif
EndEvent
Event &PesFonNum1.IsValid
FormataFone.Call(&PesFonNum1, &PesFonNum1)
EndEvent
Event &PesFonNum2.IsValid
FormataFone.Call(&PesFonNum2, &PesFonNum2)
EndEvent
Event &PesFonNum3.IsValid
FormataFone.Call(&PesFonNum3, &PesFonNum3)
EndEvent
Event &PesFonNum4.IsValid
FormataFone.Call(&PesFonNum4, &PesFonNum4)
EndEvent
Event GXUITabsPanel_TabsEnviar.TabChanged
do 'visibleBtnEnter'
EndEvent
Event GXUITabsPanel_tabs.TabChanged
do 'visibleBtnEnter'
EndEvent
Event GXUITabsPanel_Tabs2.TabChanged
do 'visibleBtnEnter'
EndEvent
Event Enter
if GXUITabsPanel_TabsEnviar.ActivePage = 1 //Envia Email &SdtEmail.Clear() &pattern = "^((\w+([-+.']\w+)*@\w+([-.]\w+)*\.\w+([-.]\w+)*)|(\s*))$" // valid email address pattern
If not &EmlUrl1.IsEmpty() and (&EmlUrl1.IsMatch(&pattern) = true) &ItemSdtEmail = new() &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl = &EmlUrl1 &SdtEmail.Add(&ItemSdtEmail) EndIf
If not &EmlUrl2.IsEmpty() and (&EmlUrl2.IsMatch(&pattern) = true) &ItemSdtEmail = new() &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl = &EmlUrl2 &SdtEmail.Add(&ItemSdtEmail) EndIf
If not &EmlUrl3.IsEmpty() and (&EmlUrl3.IsMatch(&pattern) = true) &ItemSdtEmail = new() &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl = &EmlUrl3 &SdtEmail.Add(&ItemSdtEmail) EndIf
If not &EmlUrl4.IsEmpty() and (&EmlUrl4.IsMatch(&pattern) = true) &ItemSdtEmail = new() &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl = &EmlUrl4 &SdtEmail.Add(&ItemSdtEmail) EndIf
If not &EmlUrl5.IsEmpty() and (&EmlUrl5.IsMatch(&pattern) = true) &ItemSdtEmail = new() &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl = &EmlUrl5 &SdtEmail.Add(&ItemSdtEmail) EndIf
If not &EmlUrl6.IsEmpty() and (&EmlUrl6.IsMatch(&pattern) = true) &ItemSdtEmail = new() &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl = &EmlUrl6 &SdtEmail.Add(&ItemSdtEmail) EndIf
Do case case &SdtEmail.Count = 0 msg('Nenhum Endereço de E-Mail foi informado!') &EmlUrl1.SetFocus() case &EmlAss.IsEmpty() msg('Você deve informar o assunto!') &EmlAss.SetFocus() otherwise GravaEnvioEmail.Call( &EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, 0, TipoContaEmail.Email_Faturamento, &EmlAss, TipoSolicitacao.Envia_NFE, &Context.PesCod, &Mensagem, &SdtEmail, &sdtBoleto) Return EndCase Else //WHATS APP FormataFone.Call(&PesFonNum1, &PesFonNum1) FormataFone.Call(&PesFonNum2, &PesFonNum2) FormataFone.Call(&PesFonNum3, &PesFonNum3) FormataFone.Call(&PesFonNum4, &PesFonNum4)
&WaDtaEms = serverdate() &Ano = year(&WaDtaEms) &Mes = month(&WaDtaEms) &WaAnoMes = trim(str(&Ano)) + padL(trim(str(&mes)),2,'0') &IsGerouPDF = false
&IsPodeEnviar = true if not &PesFonNum1.IsEmpty() &WaFonDest = &PesFonNum1 do 'GravaEnvio' Endif
if &IsPodeEnviar = true if not &PesFonNum2.IsEmpty() &WaFonDest = &PesFonNum2 do 'GravaEnvio' Endif Endif if &IsPodeEnviar = true if not &PesFonNum3.IsEmpty() &WaFonDest = &PesFonNum3 do 'GravaEnvio' Endif Endif if &IsPodeEnviar = true if not &PesFonNum4.IsEmpty() &WaFonDest = &PesFonNum4 do 'GravaEnvio' Endif Endif
if &IsPodeEnviar = true Return Else txtexedido.Visible = 1 txtexedido.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) Endif ENdif
EndEvent
Sub 'GravaEnvio'
&IsPodeEnviar = false &IsJaEnviado = false &IsPrimeiraVez = false //Verificar se o numero ja foi enviado hoje prcWhatsApp_VerificaJaEnviado.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &WaAnoMes, &WaDtaEms, &WaFonDest, &IsJaEnviado) If &IsJaEnviado = false //se nao foi enviado verificar se pode enviar
prcWhatsApp_verificaQtdEnviadaAnoMes.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &WaAnoMes, &WaAnoMesQtd, &EmpQtdWhatsMsg) if &EmpQtdWhatsMsg > &WaAnoMesQtd &IsPodeEnviar = true &IsPrimeiraVez = true Endif
Else &IsPodeEnviar = true Endif
if &IsPodeEnviar = true //grava envio
&WaMensagem = 'Envio de Nota Fiscal: ' + trim(&DuplicatasMensagem) //PREENCHER MENSAGEM prcWhatsApp_GravaEnvio.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &WaAnoMes, &WaDtaEms, &WaFonDest, &IsPrimeiraVez, &WaMensagem, 0, &FilCod, &NfeCod, 0, &Context.PesCod, &WaGUID)
if &IsGerouPDF = false //GERA O PDF DOS BOLETOS
&Data = serverdate() &Hora = serverTime() &mensagem = trim(toformattedString(&Data)) + trim(&Hora) &mensagem = RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(&mensagem) retornaConfiguracoesPastas.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &SdtConfiguracoesPasta)
//porque nao eh para enviar o danf NFC-e modo A4 GeraPdfDanfe_EnviaEmail.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, &AuxUrlVirtual, &URlFisico)
// &AuxUrlVirtual= &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempVir.Trim() + 'envBoletos' + trim(&mensagem) + '.pdf' // &URlFisico = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempFis.Trim() + 'envBoletos' + trim(&mensagem) + '.pdf' // &File.Source = &URlFisico // if &File.Exists() // &File.Delete() // EndIf // RELJAS045_toFile1.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &newsdtBoleto, &URlFisico) Endif &IsGerouPDF = true
//GRAVA FILA DE ENVIO prcFilaEnvioWhats_EnviaNotaFiscal.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, &Context.PesCod, &PedCliCod, &WaFonDest, &WaGUID, &URlFisico, &AuxUrlVirtual) Endif
EndSub
Sub 'getNumeroFone'
&PesFonNum.SetEmpty() &PesFonCon.SetEmpty()
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &PedCliCod Where PesFonCod = &PesFonCod &PesFonNum = PesFonNum &PesFonCon = PesFonCon Exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'GetPedido'
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &nfeFilCod Where PedCod = &Nfepedcod
&PedVeiPla = FormataPLACA.Udp(EmpCod, PedVeiPla)
Exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'visibleBtnEnter'
btnEnter.Visible = 0 if GXUITabsPanel_TabsEnviar.ActivePage = 1 //Envia Email if GXUITabsPanel_tabs.ActivePage = 1 btnEnter.Visible = 1 Endif Else //Envia Whats if GXUITabsPanel_Tabs2.activePage = 1 and &EmpQtdWhatsMsg > 0 if GXUITabsPanel_TabsEnviar.ActivePage = 2 btnEnter.Visible = 1 Endif
Endif Endif
EndSub
Sub 'LoadDados'
&SdtEmail.Clear() For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where NfeCod = &NfeCod &FilFonNum = FilFonNum &waFilFonNum = FilFonNum
&PedCliCod = NfeCliCod &NfeNum = NfeNum
&nfeFilCod = NfeFilCod &Nfepedcod = NfePedCod do 'GetPedido' if &PedVeiPla.Length() = 8 &EmlAss = format('Nota Fiscal %1 da %2, Placa: %3', trim(toformattedString(&NfeNum)), trim(FilFan), &PedVeiPla) Else &EmlAss = 'Nota Fiscal ' + trim(toformattedString(&NfeNum)) + ' da ' + trim(FilFan) Endif
&PesRaz = NfeCliRaz RetornaEmailFaturamento.call(EmpCod, NfeCliCod, &SdtEmail)
//####################### Adiciona e-mai da transportadora informado na emissão da nota
If not NfeTraEml.Trim().IsEmpty() and not NfeTraEml.IsNull() &itemSdtEmail = new() &itemSdtEmail.EmlUrl = NfeTraEml &SdtEmail.Add(&itemSdtEmail) EndIF //+ os e-mails do cadastro If NfeTraCod <> 0 RetornaEmailFaturamento.call(EmpCod, NfeTraCod, &SdtEmail) EndIf
RetornaPessoaTelefones.Call(EmpCod, NfeCliCod, &SDT_PessoaTelefones) //############################################################### Exit EndFor
For &ItemSdtEmail in &SdtEmail Do Case Case &EmlUrl1.IsEmpty() &EmlUrl1 = &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl
Case &EmlUrl2.IsEmpty() &EmlUrl2 = &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl
Case &EmlUrl3.IsEmpty() &EmlUrl3 = &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl
Case &EmlUrl4.IsEmpty() &EmlUrl4 = &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl
Case &EmlUrl5.IsEmpty() &EmlUrl5 = &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl
Case &EmlUrl6.IsEmpty() &EmlUrl6 = &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl
Otherwise Exit EndCAse EndFor &SdtEmail.Clear()
For &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem in &SDT_PessoaTelefones if &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonWhatsFat = true Do Case CAse &PesFonNum1.IsEmpty() &PesFonNum1 = &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonNum if not &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonCon.IsEmpty() txtad1.Caption = 'Contato: ' + &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonCon Endif
CAse &PesFonNum2.IsEmpty() if &PesFonNum1 <> &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonNum &PesFonNum2 = &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonNum if not &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonCon.IsEmpty() txtad2.Caption = 'Contato: ' + &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonCon Endif Endif
CAse &PesFonNum3.IsEmpty() if &PesFonNum1 <> &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonNum and &PesFonNum2 <> &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonNum &PesFonNum3 = &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonNum if not &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonCon.IsEmpty() txtad3.Caption = 'Contato: ' + &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonCon Endif Endif
CAse &PesFonNum4.IsEmpty() if &PesFonNum1 <> &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonNum and &PesFonNum2 <> &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonNum and &PesFonNum3 <> &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonNum &PesFonNum4 = &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonNum if not &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonCon.IsEmpty() txtad4.Caption = 'Contato: ' + &SDT_PessoaTelefonesItem.PesFonCon Endif Endif EndCase EndIf EndFor
EndSub

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Qtd Max. Msg WhatsApp no Mes
